/.title: Time Mission – 25+ Interactive Mission Rooms
/.description: Step into the mission. Teams of 2–5 compete through 25+ immersive missions at Time Mission, test your speed, strength, skill, and smarts.

/about.title: About | Time Mission
/about.description: Time Mission is the next generation of immersive gaming. Built for groups, powered by real-time scoring, inspired by escape rooms and video games.

/missions.title: Missions | Time Mission
/missions.description: Explore 25+ action-packed challenge rooms at Time Mission. From speed to strategy, each mission tests something different.

/groups.title: Groups & Events | Time Mission
/groups.description: Birthday parties, corporate team-building, and private events at Time Mission. Two ways to book: group tickets or full custom events.

/groups/bachelor-ette.title: Bachelor & Bachelorette Parties | Time Mission
/groups/bachelor-ette.description: Bachelor and bachelorette parties at Time Mission. 25+ head-to-head missions, team chaos, and a night that beats a bar crawl, crews welcome.

/groups/birthdays.title: Birthday Parties | Time Mission
/groups/birthdays.description: Host an unforgettable birthday party at Time Mission. Private missions, party hosts, and space for cake, we handle the setup so you can just show up and celebrate.

/groups/corporate.title: Corporate Events & Team Outings | Time Mission
/groups/corporate.description: Team outings, offsites, and corporate events at Time Mission. 25+ interactive missions, head-to-head scoring, and a session your team will actually show up for.

/groups/field-trips.title: Field Trips & School Groups | Time Mission
/groups/field-trips.description: Book a Time Mission field trip. 25+ interactive missions that turn physics, problem-solving, and teamwork into an adventure. Weekday group rates, ages 6+.

/groups/holidays.title: Holiday Parties at Time Mission
/groups/holidays.description: Skip the banquet hall. Host your holiday party at Time Mission, 25+ interactive missions, group scoring, and a session people actually look forward to.

/groups/private-events.title: Private Events & Venue Buyouts | Time Mission
/groups/private-events.description: Buy out a Time Mission location for your private event. Full-venue access, 25+ interactive missions, custom configurations, and scalable capacity for milestone celebrations.

/gift-cards.title: Gift Cards | Time Mission
/gift-cards.description: Give the gift of the mission. Time Mission gift cards work at every location and never expire.

/faq.title: FAQ | Time Mission
/faq.description: Everything you need to know before your first Time Mission, age limits, pricing, what to wear, how teams work, and more.

/contact.title: Contact Us | Time Mission
/contact.description: Contact Time Mission for questions, group bookings, or media inquiries. We respond within one business day.

/contact-thank-you.title: Message Sent | Time Mission
/contact-thank-you.description: Thanks for contacting Time Mission. We received your message and will respond soon.

/locations.title: Locations | Time Mission
/locations.description: Find a Time Mission near you, locations in Philadelphia, Mount Prospect, Houston, West Nyack, Lincoln, Manassas, and Antwerp.

/philadelphia.title: Time Mission Philadelphia – 25+ Interactive Mission Rooms
/philadelphia.description: Teams of 2–5 compete through 25+ immersive missions. Time Mission Philadelphia, book your adventure today.

/houston.title: Time Mission Houston – Coming Soon to Texas
/houston.description: Time Mission is bringing 25+ immersive mission rooms to Houston, Texas — birthday parties, corporate offsites, and group experiences for teams of 2–5. Sign up for early-access pricing and opening updates.

/mount-prospect.title: Time Mission Mount Prospect – 25+ Interactive Mission Rooms
/mount-prospect.description: Time Mission Mount Prospect, 25+ challenge rooms for groups of 2–5. Book your mission today.

/west-nyack.title: Time Mission West Nyack – 25+ Interactive Mission Rooms
/west-nyack.description: Time Mission West Nyack at Palisades Center, 25+ immersive challenges for teams of 2–5. Book your mission today.

/lincoln.title: Time Mission Lincoln – 25+ Interactive Mission Rooms
/lincoln.description: Time Mission Lincoln, 25+ immersive challenge rooms for groups of 2–5. Book your mission today.

/manassas.title: Time Mission Manassas – 25+ Interactive Mission Rooms
/manassas.description: Time Mission Manassas, 25+ immersive challenge rooms for groups of 2–5. Book your mission today.

/antwerp.title: Time Mission Antwerp – 25+ Interactive Mission Rooms
/antwerp.description: Time Mission Antwerp, 25+ immersive challenge rooms for groups of 2–5. Réserve ta mission.

/orland-park.title: Time Mission Orland Park – Coming Soon to the Chicago Area
/orland-park.description: Time Mission is opening a second Chicago-area location in Orland Park, IL — joining our Mount Prospect venue. 25+ themed missions for groups, birthdays, and corporate events. Get notified when bookings open.

/dallas.title: Time Mission Dallas – Coming Soon to Texas
/dallas.description: Time Mission is bringing 25+ immersive challenge rooms to Dallas, Texas — for teams of 2–5 with packages for birthdays, corporate outings, and private events. Reserve your spot.

/brussels.title: Time Mission Brussels – Coming Soon to Belgium
/brussels.description: Time Mission is expanding to Brussels — joining our Antwerp venue with 25+ immersive missions for groups, families, and corporate teams across Belgium. Sign up for opening updates.

/terms.description: Time Mission terms and conditions for booking, participation, and use of our venues.
